name: brisvia-miner
description: Brisvia (BRVA) desktop miner — mine with your CPU and join the network.
author: Brisvia
//: Architecture: Tauri (system webview, lightweight and with fewer antivirus false positives) + UI in src/renderer + Rust backend in src-tauri. The real mining engine (cpuminer/XMRig fork, rx/brva profile) runs as a separate native process, orchestrated by the backend.
